summary: The home page renders correctly on desktop and mobile but carries a slow LCP (7 s) dragging performance to 72. The /about page is a bare placeholder, and all three /projects pages return completely blank white screens with zeroed Lighthouse scores, indicating those routes are not yet live.

pages.visual_fingerprint: Full-page portfolio homepage with a teal-accented hero ('App' heading, 'Send me a message' CTA), four content sections (pillars, case studies, skills, contact form), and a dark teal footer — all sections visible and correctly laid out on both desktop and mobile.

visual_findings: Page contains only the placeholder text 'This is an about page' on an otherwise blank white canvas — no real content, nav, or footer present.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Entirely blank white page with only the stub text 'This is an about page' in the upper-left corner and no other UI elements.

visual_findings: Page renders as a completely blank white screen with no content, navigation, or error message visible on desktop or mobile.
pages.visual_fingerprint: Completely blank white page with no visible content on either desktop or mobile.

visual_findings: Page renders as a completely blank white screen with no content, navigation, or error message visible on desktop or mobile.

top_fix: Investigate and fix the blank /projects routes (all three return zeroed Lighthouse scores and pure-white screenshots), then address the 7 s LCP on the homepage — likely caused by an unoptimised hero image or render-blocking resource.
